//rule-1-pin: Every dependency is pinned to an exact version, in every ecosystem.
//rule-2-cooldown: Never adopt a release younger than 72h (supply-chain safety). internalChecksFilter:strict makes Renovate actually hold the PR until the cooldown passes.
//rule-3-latest: Track the latest release. Majors are surfaced but require explicit approval on the dependency dashboard so app-code migrations (React 19, recharts 3, TS 6, Tauri 2, FastAPI majors) are reviewed, not auto-merged.

vulnerabilityAlerts.//: Security fixes are still held to the 72h cooldown — that window is precisely when malicious/compromised releases are caught.

packageRules.description: Group non-major npm dev tooling into one PR.
Group non-major Python updates into one PR.
Group non-major Rust updates into one PR.
